description: Add an idempotency-key check to an existing Stripe webhook handler.
task_description: The repo has /webhooks/stripe handling charge.refunded events. Add an idempotency-key check that gates the handler on the `Stripe-Idempotency-Key` header, persisting the key to a `stripe_idempotency_keys` table for 24 hours. Existing migration tooling is goose. Verify against the existing Hoverfly tape suite.
